title: News predictions on Eva 40
wikitext:
[]: News predictions on Eva 4.0 Post by TheDrmcvey » Tue Mar 04, 2014 11:47 pm Like many of you, I have been craving for 4.0 news over the last 12 months. While I do appreciate that Anno and his staff have been taking their time on the project, I am very upset that he hasn't given us any teasers or hints about the new project or what we're in for. I know I may be sounding a little impatient, but I have been one of the very few Eva fans who have supported 3.0's story this entire time and I have taken a lot of criticism for liking it from other fans. What I'm trying to say is that I need some info about the film so I can get some of these people off my back. Seriously, it's tough supporting an Eva film nowadays, and I didn't think that was possible? If any of you have or don't have any recent news on it, can any of you predict when Khara will release any news regarding the film? I've seen certain patterns in the past of news being released, and I'd have to assume that we would get something this summer or even this fall? What do you all think?

[]: Post by lastcody » Wed Mar 05, 2014 2:31 am patience is a virtue

[]: Post by Blue Monday » Wed Mar 05, 2014 4:10 am Thread lock inbound...

[]: Post by NemZ » Wed Mar 05, 2014 7:27 am You 'll get it when you get it. Khara owes you nothing. And Blue Monday? "InB4lock" posts are against the rules (posting, section J). Depending on context it's either backseat modding or contentless shitposting, but a bad habit either way.

Article: News predictions on Eva 40
[]: News predictions on Eva 4.0 Post by TheDrmcvey » Tue Mar 04, 2014 11:47 pm Like many of you, I have been craving for 4.0 news over the last 12 months. While I do appreciate that Anno and his staff have been taking their time on the project, I am very upset that he hasn't given us any teasers or hints about the new project or what we're in for. I know I may be sounding a little impatient, but I have been one of the very few Eva fans who have supported 3.0's story this entire time and I have taken a lot of criticism for liking it from other fans. What I'm trying to say is that I need some info about the film so I can get some of these people off my back. Seriously, it's tough supporting an Eva film nowadays, and I didn't think that was possible? If any of you have or don't have any recent news on it, can any of you predict when Khara will release any news regarding the film? I've seen certain patterns in the past of news being released, and I'd have to assume that we would get something this summer or even this fall? What do you all think?
